</div>
<table class="small">
<thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Payer context</th><th>Claim status</th><th>Days remaining</th><th>Control gap</th><th>Priority</th></tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td>TF-003</td><td>Commercial participating</td><td>Documentation hold</td><td>11</td><td>No owner; rule copied from old spreadsheet</td><td>Critical</td></tr>
<tr><td>TF-006</td><td>Original Medicare</td><td>EDI rejected</td><td>17</td><td>Rejection not routed to correction queue</td><td>Critical</td></tr>
<tr><td>TF-009</td><td>TRICARE U.S.</td><td>Ready to submit</td><td>22</td><td>No stored service-location evidence</td><td>High</td></tr>
<tr><td>TF-012</td><td>Commercial secondary</td><td>Waiting for primary EOB</td><td>Unknown</td><td>Secondary rule and trigger date not documented</td><td>High</td></tr>
<tr><td>TF-015</td><td>Medicaid MCO</td><td>Corrected claim</td><td>14</td><td>Original claim receipt not linked</td><td>Critical</td></tr>
<tr><td>TF-018</td><td>Commercial out-of-network</td><td>Submitted</td><td>28</td><td>Clearinghouse acceptance not confirmed</td><td>High</td></tr>
<tr><td>TF-021</td><td>Medicare Advantage</td><td>Provider edit hold</td><td>19</td><td>Deadline assumed from Original Medicare</td><td>Critical</td></tr>
<tr><td>TF-024</td><td>Commercial participating</td><td>Pending attachment</td><td>26</td><td>No internal safety deadline</td><td>High</td></tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<div class="grid2" style="margin-top:16px">
  <article class="card black"><h3>Baseline finding</h3><p>The most dangerous records were not necessarily the oldest. They were the claims with uncertain rule sources, silent rejections, unresolved ownership, or missing proof.</p></article>
  <article class="card"><h3>Patient-to-professional insight</h3><p>A missed filing deadline can become a patient experience problem when balances are delayed, corrected late, transferred incorrectly, or communicated without clear explanation.</p></article>
</div>
</section>

<section class="page">
<div class="toprule"></div>
<div class="eyebrow">Control redesign</div><h2 style="margin-top:10px">Timely Filing Closed-Loop Control Model&trade;</h2>
<div class="flow">
  <div class="step"><div class="node">01</div><strong>IDENTIFY<br>exact payer product</strong></div>
  <div class="step"><div class="node">02</div><strong>VERIFY<br>authoritative rule</strong></div>
  <div class="step"><div class="node">03</div><strong>CALCULATE<br>external + safety dates</strong></div>
  <div class="step"><div class="node">04</div><strong>PREPARE<br>clean claim evidence</strong></div>
  <div class="step"><div class="node">05</div><strong>SUBMIT<br>approved channel</strong></div>
</div>
<div class="flow" style="margin-top:14px">
  <div class="step"><div class="node">06</div><strong>CAPTURE<br>receipt evidence</strong></div>
  <div class="step"><div class="node">07</div><strong>MONITOR<br>acknowledgement</strong></div>
  <div class="step"><div class="node">08</div><strong>CORRECT<br>rejection or defect</strong></div>
  <div class="step"><div class="node">09</div><strong>ESCALATE<br>aging exception</strong></div>
  <div class="step"><div class="node">10</div><strong>CLOSE<br>adjudication verified</strong></div>
</div>
<table style="margin-top:20px">
<thead><tr><th>Control field</th><th>Required content</th><th>Why it matters</th><th>Escalation trigger</th></tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td>Exact coverage context</td><td>Payer, product, plan, network status, state, line of business</td><td>Prevents brand-level assumptions.</td><td>Coverage context incomplete or conflicting.</td></tr>
<tr><td>Claim type</td><td>Original, corrected, replacement, void, secondary, appeal, reconsideration</td><td>Different pathways may have different timeframes.</td><td>Claim type unknown or changed after submission.</td></tr>
<tr><td>Deadline basis</td><td>Date of service, discharge, primary adjudication, notice, or contract-defined event</td><td>Ensures the correct start date is used.</td><td>Trigger date is unavailable or disputed.</td></tr>
<tr><td>Authoritative source</td><td>Contract/manual title, section, version, effective date, reviewer</td><td>Supports traceability and policy validation.</td><td>No current source or source conflict.</td></tr>
<tr><td>Internal safety date</td><td>External deadline minus approved buffer</td><td>Creates time for correction and resubmission.</td><td>Claim crosses high-risk aging threshold.</td></tr>
<tr><td>Submission evidence</td><td>Transaction control number, clearinghouse report, portal receipt, timestamp</td><td>Distinguishes "sent" from "accepted."</td><td>No acknowledgement within defined interval.</td></tr>
<tr><td>Closure evidence</td><td>Accepted, adjudicated, corrected, appealed, or authorized exception</td><td>Prevents silent work-queue abandonment.</td><td>Claim remains unresolved after escalation.</td></tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</section>

<section class="page">
<div class="toprule"></div>
<div class="section-head"><div><div class="eyebrow">Deadline evidence matrix</div><h2 style="margin-top:10px">A safer alternative to a static payer cheat sheet.</h2></div><p class="side">The matrix stores evidence and logic instead of relying on memory or a social-media table.</p></div>
<table class="small">
<thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Example value</th><th>Validation requirement</th><th>Status vocabulary</th></tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td>Coverage context</td><td>Cigna participating commercial plan</td><td>Verify ID card, eligibility result, contract/network context</td><td>Confirmed / Conflict / Unresolved</td></tr>
<tr><td>Rule source</td><td>Cigna provider claims page</td><td>Record retrieval date and applicable exception</td><td>Current / Superseded / Unknown</td></tr>
<tr><td>External deadline</td><td>Calculated from authoritative rule</td><td>Formula review by second person or automated validation</td><td>Verified / Review needed</td></tr>
